chapter_title.en: Chapter 81 – Understanding the ‘الْجَوَادِ’ benevolence and ‘السَّخَاءِ’ the generousity

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/170)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/170)
text: أَوْحَى اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَى مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) أَنْ لَا تَقْتُلِ السَّامِرِيَّ فَإِنَّهُ سَخِيٌّ .

en.hubeali: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Revealed unto Musa<sup>as</sup>: “Do not kill Samiry<sup>la</sup> for he<sup>la</sup> is a generous one’.
en.sarwar: 13. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated in a marfu‘ manner saying: “He (the Imam) has said, ‘Allah the Most Majestic, the Most Glorious, sent revelation to Moses and told him not to kill the Samiriy because he was a generous person.”
